column1: # Wikidata anchor concepts — human-verified QIDs for the interwiki harvest.
# Columns:  qid <TAB> en <TAB> ru <TAB> label <TAB> # note
# Only qid + label are consumed by load_anchor_file(); en/ru are documentation
# (the live labels+aliases are fetched fresh from Wikidata at harvest time).
# label/alias match, ranked domain-description first then sitelinks), then this
# file was hand-verified — homonyms corrected to the domain sense, oil/police/
# video-game/picture-framing senses dropped, and terms Wikidata lacks a RU
# concept for removed (those will come from the parsed corpus). ~118 chemical
# elements are added automatically via the P31 element sweep (not listed here).

column5: # coarse size reduction (fixed: was crush injury)
